needed_source_context: source_text: \begin{theorem}[Transposes preserve determinants]\label{thm.det.transp}Let $n\in\mathbb{N}$. If $A\in K^{n\times n}$ is any $n\times n$-matrix, then $\det\left( A^{T}\right) =\det A$.
planned_declarations.target_statement_sketch: For any square matrix A over a commutative ring K, the determinant of the transpose equals the determinant of A.
